intended_use: Rapid ICH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and tra
intended_use_full: Rapid ICH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of pathologies in head CT images, for IPH, IVH, SAH, and SDH Intracranial Hemorrhages (ICH).
target_condition: Intracranial hemorrhage (ICH): intraparenchymal hemorrhage (IPH), intraventricular hemorrhage (IVH), subarachnoid hemorrhage (SAH), and subdural hemorrhage (SDH)
ground_truth: Expert reader truthing of retrospective case data; predefined process timeline from predicate device for time-to-open comparison
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: 0.65 minutes (95% CI: 0.63-0.67) vs. standard of care time-to-exam-open: 72.58 minutes (95% CI: 45.02-100.14); AUC 0.98632 using Rapid estimated Volume as predictor
